'''dhayadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smackaroonies|smackaroonies]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-y-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smackaroonies|smackaroonies]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhayadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæyædhæth|dhæyædhæth]] || [[word:dhæyædhæj|dhæyædhæj]] || [[word:dhæyædhæsh|dhæyædhæsh]] || [[word:dhæyædhæ|dhæyædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhayayadhath|dhayayadhath]] || [[word:dhayayadhaj|dhayayadhaj]] || [[word:dhayayadhash|dhayayadhash]] || [[word:dhayayadha|dhayayadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhayadhath|dhayadhath]] || [[word:dhayadhaj|dhayadhaj]] || [[word:dhayadhash|dhayadhash]] || [[word:dhayadha|dhayadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhayafdhath|dhayafdhath]] || [[word:dhayafdhaj|dhayafdhaj]] || [[word:dhayafdhash|dhayafdhash]] || [[word:dhayafdhaf|dhayafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhayadhatha|dhayadhatha]] || [[word:dhayadhaja|dhayadhaja]] || [[word:dhayadhasha|dhayadhasha]] || [[word:dhayadhaka|dhayadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhayadhath|dhayadhath]] || [[word:dhayadhaj|dhayadhaj]] || [[word:dhayadhash|dhayadhash]] || [[word:dhayadha|dhayadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhayadhathal|dhayadhathal]] || [[word:dhayadhajal|dhayadhajal]] || [[word:dhayadhashal|dhayadhashal]] || [[word:dhayadhakal|dhayadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhayadhathatha|dhayadhathatha]] || [[word:dhayadhajaja|dhayadhajaja]] || [[word:dhayadhashasha|dhayadhashasha]] || [[word:dhayadhaka|dhayadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhayadhathan|dhayadhathan]] || [[word:dhayadhajan|dhayadhajan]] || [[word:dhayadhashan|dhayadhashan]] || [[word:dhayadhakan|dhayadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhayadhathaoro|dhayadhathaoro]] || [[word:dhayadhajaoro|dhayadhajaoro]] || [[word:dhayadhashaoro|dhayadhashaoro]] || [[word:dhayadhakaoro|dhayadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
